/Users/dhamo/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/26.1.10909125/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/bin/clang++ --target=aarch64-none-linux-android24 --sysroot=/Users/dhamo/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/26.1.10909125/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot -fPIC -g -DANDROID -fdata-sections -ffunction-sections -funwind-tables -fstack-protector-strong -no-canonical-prefixes -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -Wformat -Werror=format-security  -O3 -fvisibility=hidden -fstack-protector-strong -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fno-rtti -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,--build-id=sha1 -Wl,--no-rosegment -Wl,--no-undefined-version -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--no-undefined -Qunused-arguments  -Wl,--gc-sections  -Wl,-soname,libaran-secure.so -o libaran-secure.so "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/rasp_core_engine.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/aran-core.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/aran_genesis.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/aran_pin_validator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/aran_scorched_earth.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/anti_frida.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/advanced_anti_frida.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/rasp_defense.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/aran-secure.dir/advanced_rasp_defense.cpp.o"  /Users/dhamo/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/26.1.10909125/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-android/24/liblog.so -latomic -lm
